title: Command Center FAT
summary: Four thermal chamber FAT swimlanes over a three-week operational window. Starts are constrained to workdays; resets resume on Monday after weekend finishes.

lanes.summary: Alpha chamber ladder with completed, live, and forecast FAT slots.
Bravo chamber ladder with completed, live, and forecast FAT slots.
Charlie chamber ladder with completed, live, and forecast FAT slots.
Delta chamber ladder with completed, live, and forecast FAT slots.
